creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Raphael Kubo da Costa <rakuco@FreeBSD.org> writes:

> We (kde@) would like to ask for an exp-run for the recently-released
> CMake 2.8.9.
> A patch can be fetched from
> http://people.freebsd.org/~rakuco/exp-runs/cmake-2.8.9-v1.diff

New patch with some plist adjustments:
http://people.freebsd.org/~rakuco/exp-runs/cmake-2.8.9-v2.diff
